name: Cherry Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut butter into dry cake mix until crumbly; reserve 1/3 cup of mixture.
2. Press the remaining remainder into an 8 x 8 x 2 baking dish, building up about 1/2" around the sides.
3. Spoon cherry pie filling over crumb mixture to just below the edge of the pan.
4. Combine the reserved crumb mixture and pecans; sprinkle over the fruit.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes.
6. Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream.
